header.description: §7Nice little features to make your game much better!
header.name: §fQ§eo§fF §c(1.2.3)

settings.text:
§l§cQ§r§lo§cF§r was made by §c@aitji§r (script) and §9@pickerth-12§r (ideas & design). §7You can tweak everything below to your liking!
§cTurn on BetaAPIs in Experiments
§7How often should QoF run? §8(lower = faster updates) §r
settings.name: qof:INTERVAL_DELAY

settings.text: §7Enable dynamic light?
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.ENABLED

settings.text: §7How §f'long'§8(game tick)§7 should light stay after it turns off? §8(higher = longer) §r §r §r §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.DECAY_LIGHT_TICK

settings.text: §7How §f'much'§7 should light be reduced? §8(final = lightLevel * §o[value]§r§8) §r §r §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.REDUCE_LIGHT

settings.text: §7When fading, how much light is lost each step? §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_REDUCE_LINEAR

settings.text: §7How §f'far'§7 can light sources be detected around you? §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_RENDER_RADIUS

settings.text: §7How §f'many'§7 light sources can affect you at once? §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_RENDER_PER_PLAYER

settings.text: §7How bright should burning entities glow? §8(affected by reduce setting) §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_FIRE_LEVEL

settings.text: §7Enable anvil repairing? §r
settings.name: qof:REPAIR_ANVIL.ENABLED

settings.text: §7How long§8(game tick)§7 to hold before repairing starts again? §r
settings.name: qof:REPAIR_ANVIL.REPAIR_HELD_DELAY

settings.text: §7Should concrete powder react to water? §r
settings.name: qof:WET_POWDER_CONCRTE.ENABLED

settings.text: §7Keep item movement after touching water? §r
settings.name: qof:WET_POWDER_CONCRTE.KEEP_VELOCITY

settings.text: §7How many items can process at once? §c(can affect performance) §r
settings.name: qof:WET_POWDER_CONCRTE.MAX_PROCESS

settings.text: §7Enable improved composter? §r
settings.name: qof:COMPOSTER.ENABLED

settings.text: §7Should hopper work with composter? §c(can affect performance) §r
settings.name: qof:COMPOSTER.WORK_WITH_HOPPER

settings.text: §7How often§8(game tick)§7 does the hopper interact with the composter? §r
settings.name: qof:COMPOSTER.HOPPER_INTERVAL_TICK

settings.text: §7How long§8(game tick)§7 before the composter is ready? §r
settings.name: qof:COMPOSTER.DELAY_BEFORE_READY
